violations.text: Grease receptacle observed overflowing at time of inspection. PIC stated they will contact company to empty receptacles. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Employee was observed arriving for work and donning gloves prior to washing hands. Inspector informed staff of proper procedures for hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels we on a table on the other side of the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC stated hand-washing soap was stored under 3-bay (next to hand-washing sink); PIC informed to have soap at the hand-wash sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024

Per interview of staff, slicers and knives are only washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the day. The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as meats and cheeses must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024

Rice was observed held at 128 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated to 181 during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024

Various sauces were observed held between 44- and 68 degrees Fahrenheit in the prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved sauces to refrigeration to quick chill. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024

The rice scoops were stored on an unclean surface (top of counter) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. PIC places scoops in clean and sanitized pans. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
The dumpster area was observed with litter and debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024

Tzatziki sauce was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling Tzatziki sauce was placed in the freezer to rapidly chill. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener base, and prep tables, and table beneath the grill have an accumulation of dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2023

The dumpster outside is located on grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2023

The area around the grease recycling bin has an accumulation of grease and debris. The slab for the dumpster, has an accumulation of trash and vegetation. Waste areas must be maintained clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2023

The floors around and behind the grease trap, and beneath & behind the fryers and grill in the front have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2023

The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2023

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as tomatoes) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, food processor, food containers on clean storage rack) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. All items are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023

Tzatziki sauce was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Tzatziki sauce was placed in shallow containers in the refrigerator. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023

Tzatziki sauce was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023
Working containers used for storing chemicals (soap) taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023
Food observed stored on the floor in the dining room, and in the kitchen beneath food prep sink. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023
Water observed in stacked food containers on clean storage rack. Equipment and utensils must be air dried before use. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023

Single service items observed stored on the floor in the electrical room. Single service items observed not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean. Single service items observed stored on the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023
Single service items shall not be stored in an electrical room. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023
Various food containers are being reused. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the 3 bay sink sanitizing solution for the quaternary ammonia. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris:storage shelvingtable beneath flattop grillvertical broilersprep tablerefrigerator New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023

The dumpster outside is located on grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023
The oil recycling container has an accumulation of grease and debris.Oil recycling container must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023

The area outside the kitchen door has an accumulation of water, soil residue, grease, and debris. Water observed dripping from ceiling vent in dining room, and water droplets observed on the ceiling vent in the kitchen. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2023

The floors, walls, prep sink, water pipe along wall in the front area, and ceiling fan vents, have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2023
